title: Product Solutions
subtitle: Deep into business scenarios, providing product and service combinations

solution-intro-01.title: Unified Data Intelligence Platform
solution-intro-01.subtitle: Data ontology construction, discovering hidden value and deep relationships
solution-intro-01.description: For government and enterprise digital scenarios, breaking data silos to build a secure, standard, shareable, and evolvable enterprise intelligent data foundation.

solution-intro-02.title: Knowledge Graph Engine
solution-intro-02.subtitle: Building intelligent business relationship networks for deep decisions
solution-intro-02.description: Based on knowledge graph and semantic modeling, constructing entity relationship networks, mining hidden data connections, supporting complex business analysis and intelligent reasoning.

solution-intro-03.title: Intelligent Dispatch Engine
solution-intro-03.subtitle: Data-driven intelligent decisions for unified command and dispatch
solution-intro-03.description: Based on data and knowledge capabilities, achieving optimized resource allocation and dynamic scheduling, supporting emergency management and real-time command in complex scenarios.

solution-intro-04.title: Digital Twin Simulation Platform
solution-intro-04.subtitle: Digital twin technology and model reasoning for full-scenario analysis and forward-looking decisions
solution-intro-04.description: Building high-fidelity digital twin models, supporting multi-scenario simulation and risk prediction, providing scientific support for planning research, emergency drills, and forward-looking decisions.
